reviews.review_title: Fun game but you need to fix it
reviews.review_description: 1 When I fly to fast a black hole get smaller 2 when I walk forward it auto walks by itself and to stop auto walking. I have to walk backwards ￼￼
Lots to do, lots of items to discover, and it’s ridiculously fun messing with NPCs.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words!

reviews.review_description: Pretty cool flying mechanics! I found a secret shrine and a rat

developer_response.body: Good job on finding those! We will maybe add more, wink wink :) but not guaranteed!

reviews.review_description: I just found a gangster rat.

developer_response.body: The best kind of rat, in our opinion! Thanks for playing :)

reviews.review_description: When i fly i go backwards

developer_response.body:
Hey mr cool, we will update the game to make the flight propel yourself more forward, in the mean time you can try to fly like swimming and that SHOULD help a little.

Please let us know if you manage to get the movement working fine

Thanks for playing anyway
